Distributed Systems — Interactive Visualizations

Thirty-two interactive visualizations on distributed systems — from CAP theorem and Raft consensus to CRDTs, gossip protocols, and distributed transactions.

README · the roadmap (32/32) ← all tutorials

Every card opens a live .html demo recomputed in your browser; the md chip opens the guide and the py chip the source on GitHub. Tailwind Play CDN needs internet to style.

The front door of the dist/ visualization suite. Each card click opens the static .html demo (runs live in the browser); the md chip links the write-up guide and the py chip the canonical source on GitHub. Progress persists locally under localStorage["dist-done"].
